title: Schoenus corymbosus
taxonomy: Schoenus corymbosus is classified as a species of sedge, belonging to the family Cyperaceae. This classification places it within the larger order Poales, which includes many types of grasses and sedges. Schoenus corymbosus is further classified as a member of the genus Schoenus, a group of sedges native to Australia and other parts of the world. The species is considered to be a part of the family Cyperaceae, which consists of over 5,000 species of sedges and rushes. Schoenus corymbosus is a specific example of the broader classification of the family Cyperaceae.
